summary: Iteration 3 — moderation (report + auto-suspend) + copy fix (no gratis/libero). 23/23 pytest pass (5 new moderation tests + 18 regression). UI: report modal opens with all 3 data-testids, all 5 reasons present, submit shows toast and auto-blocks target. Landing & profile copy verified free of 'gratis'/'libero' and contain new acceptance phrasing. ChatDetail lock notice text confirmed via grep.
critical_code_review_comments: Report idempotency is keyed on (reporter,reported,reason). A single reporter using two different reasons would count twice toward unique_reporters? No — distinct on reporter_id, so safe. Good design.
AUTO_SUSPEND is irreversible from app (no admin unsuspend endpoint). Accepted per spec as MVP limitation; add admin endpoint when productionizing.
report_user auto-blocks reporter -> reported via $addToSet on blocked_users; verified target disappears from reporter's /users/nearby.

Suspended gating is enforced in 3 places: /users/nearby filter, POST /conversations (both self and target), POST /conversations/{id}/messages (self). All return correct 403 with Italian messages matching spec.
server.py now ~778 lines — over the 700-line soft limit. Recommend splitting into routers (auth, users, conversations, moderation, ws) for maintainability.
No backend index on db.reports — consider compound index (reported_id, reporter_id, reason) for idempotency lookups and distinct(reporter_id, {reported_id}) for suspension check as data grows.
seed_data_creation: Test users seeded via _seed_user helper for each test case; one UI user test-ui-rep-* + session; reports/conversations cleaned in test teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 23 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover MVP + WS + referral + moderation. Frontend selectors: data-testid='report-btn','report-reason-select','report-detail-input','report-submit-btn'. Copy strings to preserve: landing manifesto 'Il primo messaggio lo mandi sempre tu...', Profile helper 'serve la sua accettazione', ChatDetail 'In attesa che ti accetti'.
